methods.name: add_item
methods.summary: The #add_item method is used to add a menu item to the specified menu.
methods.remarks: The #add_item method is used to add a menu item to the specified menu. This method takes a block that defines the action to perform when the menu item is selected. The item id that is returned can be used when adding an optional validation procedure for the menu item.

returns.doc: A unique integer id for the added menu item.

methods.name: add_separator
methods.summary: The #add_separator method is used to add a menu separator to a menu.
methods.remarks: The #add_separator method is used to add a menu separator to a menu.

methods.name: add_submenu
methods.summary: The #add_submenu method is used to add a sub-menu to a menu.
methods.remarks: The #add_submenu method is used to add a sub-menu to a menu.

params.name: title
params.doc: The title of the sub menu.

methods.name: set_validation_proc
methods.summary: The #set_validation_proc method is used to specify the menu validation procedure.
methods.remarks: The #set_validation_proc method is used to specify the menu validation procedure. Your procedure should return either MF_ENABLED, MF_DISABLED, MF_CHECKED, MF_UNCHECKED, or MF_GRAYED.

params.name: item
params.doc: The numerical identifier for the menu item.
